freedomKeys.name: flow04_rsvp_cancellation_window_hours
freedomKeys.semantics: Number of hours before event start when attendee cancellation remains allowed.
observableIn: Tenant A visual screenshots show a 6-hour cancellation policy
Future Tenant A fork regression can seed the tenant override and assert the shortened cancellation decision path
Tenant B adapted screenshots show the inherited 6-hour cancellation policy.
Tenant C adapted screenshots show the 3-hour cancellation policy.

freedomKeys.name: flow04_feedback_window_hours
freedomKeys.semantics: Number of hours after the event when attendee feedback remains open.
observableIn: Tenant A visual screenshots show feedback open for 12 hours
Feedback window service reads the same flow-scoped key used by tenant configuration
Tenant B adapted screenshots show feedback open for 8 hours.
Tenant C adapted screenshots preserve feedback open for 8 hours.

chosenAdaptation.reason: This is the smallest safe proof for FLOW-04 because RSVP cancellation and feedback duration are tenant-scoped values already owned by the flow. The adaptation changes visible policy without adding service structure or changing the default source module.

tenantBCascadeAdaptation.rationale: Northwind sponsor forums preserve Acme onsite cancellation discipline while shortening feedback collection to the same business day.

tenantCCascadeAdaptation.rationale: Tessera circle sessions preserve Northwind same-day feedback while allowing cancellation until three hours before start.
